summary: Closed $42M Series C led by Argent Capital; expanding warehouse automation pilots with two Fortune 100 logistics customers
Hired Dr. Lena Osei (ex-Genentech) as Chief Medical Officer; signals push into clinical-stage trials
Launched grid-balancing API for utility customers; first paying customer is Pacific Northwest co-op
Raised $18M Series B; opening 12 new locations in the Southeast
Signed multi-year contract with national parcel carrier; not yet announced publicly
FDA cleared IND application for lead oncology candidate
Promoted Maya Chen to President; founder transitions to Executive Chair
Announced partnership with regional ISO to pilot capacity forecasting model
Closed $9M bridge round; runway extended to Q1 2027
Profiled in STAT News on novel platform approach; CMO quoted extensively
